description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has three jobs: tests, isort, and warnings, each running on ubuntu-latest. The tests job uses a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.6 to 3.10, checking out the code, setting up Python, upgrading pip and setuptools, installing dependencies, running tox, and reporting coverage. The isort and warnings jobs set up Python 3.8, upgrade pip and setuptools, install tox, and run tox with specific environments.
